headline: EFX Q1 Deep Dive: Mortgage Gains and AI Productivity Offset Macro Headwinds
summary: Credit reporting giant Equifax (NYSE:EFX) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 14.3% year on year to $1.65 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $1.70 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.86 per share was 9.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
